analysis.name: Aster
analysis.summary: ASTER近期因平台将99%费用用于回购销毁及转向仅质押排放模型（月解锁减少97%）而上涨，但ATH跌幅超73%，流通市值约16.9亿美元，FDV约49.3亿美元，估值偏高。短期受回购利好刺激，但涨幅已部分兑现，需关注解锁压力和持续性。

recommendation.invalidation: 若价格跌破0.60美元（近期支撑）或回购计划未持续执行，则逻辑失效。

catalysts: 平台将99%交易费用用于回购并销毁ASTER
转向仅质押排放模型，月解锁量减少97%

latestNews.title: Aster popped over 10% on radical 'buyback and burn' upgrade. But gains were short-lived
latestNews.reason: 回购销毁直接减少供应，但涨幅短暂说明市场情绪谨慎。

latestNews.title: ASTER Flies 23% After DEX Redirects 99% Fees to Token Buybacks
latestNews.reason: 高比例回购是强催化剂，但23%涨幅后需警惕获利回吐。

latestNews.title: Aster DEX Slashes Monthly Token Unlocks by 97% With Staking Switch
latestNews.reason: 大幅减少解锁压力，改善供需关系。

fundamentals: 下一代去中心化永续交易所，支持高达100倍杠杆
由Astherus和APX Finance合并而来，APX可迁移至ASTER
支持简单模式（最高1001倍杠杆）和专业模式（订单簿、隐藏订单）
总供应量80亿，流通约26.77亿，FDV约49.3亿美元
marketRead: ATH为2.41美元，当前价格0.63049美元，ATH跌幅73.82%
Raydium上ASTER/USDC流动性约7.38亿美元，但24小时交易量仅278美元，流动性深度与交易量不匹配，可能存在虚假深度或低流动性风险。
risks: FDV高达49.3亿美元，估值偏高，解锁压力仍存（总供应量80亿，流通仅26.77亿）
ATH跌幅超73%，长期持有者套牢盘重
Raydium上交易量极低（24小时278美元），流动性可能不真实
回购计划可持续性未知，若停止则利好消退
watchlist: 回购销毁执行情况（链上数据）
月解锁量是否持续减少
价格能否站稳0.70美元上方
sourceNotes: 数据来自CoinGecko和DexScreener，Raydium交易量极低，价格可能不反映真实市场
新闻主要来自6月中下旬，时效性较高但需验证

profile.name: Aster
profile.description: Aster is a next-generation decentralized perpetual exchange that combines non-custodial trading with advanced features like hidden orders and multi-chain support. The platform emerged from the merger of Astherus and APX Finance in late 2024, with APX token holders able to migrate their holdings to ASTER. Aster addresses the gap between centralized and decentralized exchanges by enabling traders to maintain full control of their assets while accessing deep liquidity and CEX-grade trading tools. The platform supports trading of both cryptocurrency perpetuals and U.S. stocks with up to 100x leverage, all settled on-chain in crypto without requiring traditional financial infrastructure. The platform offers two distinct trading modes to accommodate different user needs. Simple Mode provides one-click, MEV-resistant trading with up to 1001x leverage for beginners, while Pro Mode delivers a full order book with advanced features like automated grid trading and hidden orders that remain invisible until execution. Aster operates across BNB Chain, Ethereum, Solana, and Arbitrum without requiring bridging, with liquidity pooled across markets to support large trades with minimal slippage. A d
